programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Teams answer questions to earn time and advantages over their competitors before going on a supermarket shopping spree; the team that adds the most valuable items to its cart wins.

programme.title: Slipknot - Day of the Gusano
programme.desc: On December 8th 2015, after more than a decade of patiently waiting, the Mexican Maggots finally welcome the most anticipated visit of Slipknot and Knotfest to Mexico. The band did not disappoint. This show will leave you speechless and craving more.

programme.title: Linkin Park - Live in New York
programme.desc: Filmed at the Madison Square Garden in New York, this concert film gives all fans a spectacular live experience from start to finish; Linkin Park performs hits including "Numb," "In the End," "Bleed It Out" and many more.

programme.title: Michael Bolton - Live at the Royal Albert Hall
programme.desc: Join Michael Bolton for an unforgettable concert at London's famous Royal Albert Hall as he delivers hit after hit in his trademark soulful style in front of a packed audience.

programme.title: Led Zeppelin - Physical Graffiti: A Classic Album Under Review
programme.desc: This is a documentary film about the build-up, making, release, and music contained on this most revered of albums. This is the complete story behind what Rolling Stone called their Tommy, Beggars Banquet and Sgt. Pepper rolled into one.

programme.title: The Everly Brothers Reunion Concert
programme.desc: The 1983 London reunion features "Bye, Bye Love," "Wake Up Little Suzie," "Bird Dog" and "Cathy's Clown."

programme.title: R.E.M. -- Live in Milan 2008
programme.desc: Filmed at Arena Civica, Milan, this concert film will give all fans a live experience from start to finish; R.E.M. performs unforgettable versions of their hits — "Losing My Religion", "Drive," "Man On the Moon" and many more.

programme.title: J Balvin - Bruuttal
programme.desc: J. Balvin returns to his hometown of Medellín, Colombia to perform a special anniversary concert entitled BRUUTTAL. A musical journey that begins with his early songs and ends with his most recent, multi-platinum album, Energía.

programme.title: Bob Marley: Uprising Live !
programme.desc: This live show from Dortmund's Westfalenhalle was filmed on June 13th 1980, featuring Bob Marley on superb form. Marley's energetic, charismatic performance includes I Shot The Sheriff, Get Up, Stand Up and No Woman, No Cry and the film has been subs...

programme.title: John Mayall - 70th Birthday Concert
programme.desc: Liverpools Kings Dock on July 19 2003 was the venue for a long awaited and much anticipated reunion between Eric Clapton and John Mayall & the Bluesbreakers. The occasion was both a celebration of John Mayalls 70th year and a fundraiser for Unicef.

programme.title: Stingray Djazz
programme.desc: Stingray DJAZZ is a deep dive into jazz without boundaries, offering a selection of concerts, major festival performances, rare documentaries, intimate portraits, and behind-the-scenes footage of artists from around the world.

programme.title: Janet Jackson: In Control
programme.desc: She may have been the youngest of 10 of the Jackson children, but that did not stop Janet Jackson from embracing her own identity. Her unquestioned talent has built an empire of success as Ms. Janet remains In Control.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Wiz Khalifa
programme.desc: Music superstar Wiz Khalifa gives Larry a lesson in hip-hop culture and shares his excitement over soon becoming a dad. Plus, the tattooed rapper offers Larry some pointers on getting inked.

programme.title: Larry King Now: T.I.
programme.desc: Rapper, author and entrepreneur T.I. stops to by to discuss his highly-anticipated new album, Troubleman, his time in prison, and whether the free agent will sign with a new record label. Plus, T.I. offers his stance on gun control and pot legalization.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Snoop Lion
programme.desc: Larry sits down with Snoop Lion to talk about his new name, look, and faith. Plus, Snoop opens up about why he went from being a gun-toting rapper to spreading messages of non-violence in his new reggae song, "No Guns Allowed."

programme.title: Larry King Now: 50 Cent
programme.desc: You know him as a millionaire mogul at the top of his rap game. In this candid interview, 50 Cent sheds his public image to talk about growing up without a father, what he seeks in a partner & why the media doesn’t know who he really is.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Floyd Mayweather
programme.desc: The world's best pound for pound fighter Floyd 'Money' Mayweather sits down with Larry and talks about his upcoming fight on May 4th, his first since being released from prison this past year.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Oprah Winfrey
programme.desc: Larry sits down with media mogul Oprah Winfrey to talk about her personal experiences with racism, the future of the Oprah Winfrey Network, and her new role in the civil rights film, Lee Daniels' The Butler.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Forest Whitaker and Lee Daniels
programme.desc: Academy Award-winner Forest Whitaker opens up about his personal brushes with racism, and why he had to audition for 'The Butler.' Plus, the film's director, Lee Daniels, on his most significant work yet.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Wendy Williams
programme.desc: The always candid Wendy Williams opens up about her rising career in daytime talk. She shares her colorful personality, views on the power of pop culture in everyday life, and her new auto-biography.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Mike Tyson and Evander Holyfield
programme.desc: Larry gets an earful from Iron Mike Tyson and Evander 'The Real Deal' Holyfield on their infamous 1997 bout, the current state of boxing and their new mission to feed the hungry with Yank Barry, the Founder of Global Village Champions.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Terrence Howard
programme.desc: Uncensored and candid, Terrence Howard tackles everything from his ideal woman to Oprah to his (necessary) arrogance. Plus, he reveals the role he really wanted in The Butler, and why it’s hard out there for a pim-- er, Oscar nominee.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Terry Crews
programme.desc: The actor and ex-athlete is all candor as he discusses his awe over the Golden Globes win, how he saved his marriage, and why this man calls himself a feminist. Plus, Larry gets a pec pop tutorial.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Charlamagne Tha God
programme.desc: Charlamagne Tha God dishes on his current relationships with former foe Kanye West and mentor Wendy Williams, his bold style of broadcasting, and why he'll support Hillary in 2016.

programme.title: Jay-Z: Ultimate Hustle
programme.desc: It was hardly predictable when the boy from the Brooklyn projects became the world's first billionaire hip-hop star, Jay-Z. He turned his pain into passion and used the suffering to influence the words and lyrics in his music.

programme.title: James Brown: The Man, The Music & The Message
programme.desc: James Brown: The Man, The Music & The Message is an inspiring and entertaining program about the remarkable life of \\"The Godfather Soul\\" that features his greatest hits including "Living in America" and "I Feel Good."

programme.title: Darryl Jones: In The Blood
programme.desc: Follows the evolution of Jones, who grew up on the South Side of Chicago.

programme.title: Hip Hop Don't Stop
programme.desc: This film gives us the definitive chronicle of hip-hop from its beginnings. See the evolution of music with vintage footage, live performances, and exclusive interviews with hip hop legends

programme.title: Hip Hop: The Songs That Shook America
programme.desc: JESUS WALKS by Kanye West: In an era of excess, a Christian rap song challenges the church and changes its own ideals about religion and rap music.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross spills an amazing cornucopia of red, brown, green and gold colors into this gorgeous fall mountain masterpiece - a real audience favorite.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Find the glistening sun peeking through the trees in this wintery scene; Bob Ross creates a cold day warmed by daystar radiance.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: See the amazing glacier-like peaks Bob Ross creates in this icy panorama; grab your painting knife and do this one too.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints a still lake that captures the reflection of some trees as a range of rugged mountains stand guard in the background.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: The soothing sounds of a cascading waterfall come to mind in this charming Bob Ross landscape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Powerful mountains softened with grassy meadows and little evergreens framing a nice shiny mere - this is a lovely Bob Ross masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Today Bob Ross paints a warm and elegant snow-kissed scene with a little cabin snuggled deeply into the embrace of foothills, evergreens and bushes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Stroll down to the river and cast your line with Bob Ross from the bridge - join in the fun and paint this masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Drive through mountain country with Bob Ross and happen upon a ridge of thick, rich evergreens gracing the hollow below.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross uses monochromatic tones to convey the icy coldness of a silvery lake surrounded by lacy trees and bushes - brr!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Enjoy this Bob Ross scene that includes luxurious green foliage and an old weathered trestle-bridge placed lovingly amongst all the beauty.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Sneak away into the cold shadows with Bob Ross and enjoy the beauty of a winter night at the foot of a large fierce waterfall.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes us to an isolated cabin deep in the woods on a cold, snowy winter day.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross travels with his paintbrushes into the density of an evening grove and discovers the beauty of a gentle, hushed rippling river.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes a detour from the trail and discovers a rarely used trail through country woods.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes you to a lovely spot deep in the woods where the seclusion, silence, and beauty offer serenity to the soul.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Even a tiny shanty by the pond can be a warm place in the dead of winter - Bob Ross shows us how to make a snow scene glow!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In the still of the night, trees reflect off the glistening pond and cool breeze of blows as Bob Ross takes you on this black canvas adventure.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross on a clear windless day, where reflections are so smooth they appear to be crystal likenesses of the mountains above.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Warm skies, pleasant valley and purple misty mountains - the perfect place to pitch your tent and enjoy the view with painter Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A real Bob Ross favorite - he uses blue and red highlights to accentuate the drama and beauty of a snow-bound cabin at sunset.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Come along with Bob Ross as he creates a winter moon hanging over a snow covered farm nestled among the trees - all on black canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: An interesting way to frame two pictures! Bob Ross paints a mountain landscape from luscious summer to beautiful winter, both on one canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In this dark breathtaking scene, Bob Ross creates an almost calm night with waves crashing against rocks and a protective lighthouse.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A playful brook appears the perfect complement to a range of rugged mountains in this Bob Ross setting on canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A beautiful fall scene -- Bob Ross uses the colors of nature to settle an old worn-down farm building into soft golden grassy bushes and trees.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The undaunted splendor of sky, trees, and lake has never been more beautifully portrayed than in this joyful Bob Ross creation.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We wanted to come up with recipes for two classic desserts, carrot cake and cheesecake that are a bit lighter.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we use tube and Bundt pans to make angel food cake and a chocolate Bundt cake.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We wanted to find the best way to grill shrimp so that it ends up tender, moist, and flavorful.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We set out to develop a hassle-free pizza recipe especially for the grill.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Our sour cream coffee cake and light, flavorful fruit salads transform weekend brunch into an indulgent meal.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We develop a recipe for pulled pork that rivals barbecue joints but won't be an all-day affair.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Smoked Prime Rib, Torn Potato Salad with Toasted Garlic and Herb Dressing; Grill Gloves

programme.title: Julia At Home
programme.desc: Dan showcases the bold flavor of cranberries; Lisa and Hannah put disposable and reusable bags to the test

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Grilled Chicken Breasts, Berry Granita; tasting of whole dill pickles; flatware sets

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Roasted Bone-In Chicken Breasts, Best Baked Potatoes; review of kitchen trash cans

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Beef Tenderloin with Smoky Potatoes and Persillade Relish, Turkey Breast en Cocotte with Pan Gravy.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Roast Pork Loin with 40 Cloves of Garlic, Orange Upside-Down Cake; review of hand mixers

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: Workaholics

programme.desc: The guys cheat on Karl with a new drug dealer.

programme.title: Key & Peele

programme.title: Key & Peele
programme.desc: The Rhinos' quarterback takes a hit, a Macedonian cafe owner berates his customers, and a man suspects his wife of cheating on him with a dog.

programme.title: Key & Peele
programme.desc: A detective confronts a serial killer in a funhouse, a blind man identifies a body, and a representative from the Make-A-Wish Foundation encounters an evil child.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: Beavis & Butthead features two lunkheaded teenagers who dress in heavy-metal T-shirts, love stuff that is "cool," hate stuff that "sucks," and spend most of their time sitting on a couch making fun of music videos.

programme.title: Nathan For You

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Crash of the Moons
programme.desc: The crew pokes fun at another segment of a 1960s episode of General Hospital (1963) before watching an astronaut attempt to stop two planets from colliding with each other in Crash of the Moons.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: A race of evil Moon aliens lands in ancient Greece, wreaking havoc for years on the city of Samar. It’s up to the mighty Hercules to end the chaos.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Corpse Vanishes
programme.desc: In the theater, Joel and the Bots get the third installment of "Radar Men from the Moon" before the Bela Lugosi film "The Corpse Vanishes".

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: Stay safe with this informative short about occupational hazards.

programme.title: Backlot: MST3K 25th Anniversary
programme.desc: Part three of the complete history of MST3K takes a look at the changes the series underwent throughout the course of its run, including the host and network shifts.

programme.title: MST3K: I Accuse My Parents
programme.desc: A young man gets mixed up with a crime syndicate and blames his inattentive parents. The 1940s-era documentary short explains the then-new techniques that enabled farmers to rush produce to market.

programme.desc: Joel and the Bots learn the ins and outs of the circus in the short Here Comes the Circus (1946) and then try to make sense of the Nordic fairy tale film The Day the Earth Froze (1959).

programme.title: MST3K: Cry Wilderness
programme.desc: Follows the adventures of a young boy, Paul Cooper, who gets a vision from old pal Bigfoot while he's at boarding school.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: A professor and his students camp out in the rural Arkansas swamp, in hopes of finding a Bigfoot-like creature.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Truman puts Hank in prison for the attempted murder of Leo, while Hank points the finger at Josie for the murder of Andrew Packard. Albert reveals that Josie shot Cooper. Ben enlists John Justice Wheeler to help him stop the Ghostwood plans.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall investigate the whereabouts of four million dollars still missing from a six-year-old drug bust that implicates the police in criminal activity.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall investigate the death of a multi-millionaire, whose four heirs become prime suspects.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: The only clue in a series of murders is a trail of police-issued ammunition that leads Hunter and McCall to suspect a colleague as the killer.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan finds a murder victim among the trauma patients from a major bus accident.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A senator's drug-addicted daughter is killed during an altercation with her father, but a senior aide covers up the incident as an overdose.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan and a headstrong attorney (Piper Laurie) investigate a drive-by shooting at a high school.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: There's a reunion of former Texas Rangers and there's a shooting competition with cops from all over the country coming to take part in. An old friend of Alex's, a Senator who is rumored to be running for President is also in town.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: There's a reunion of former Texas Rangers and there's a shooting competition with cops from all over the country coming to take part in. An old friend of Alex's, a Senator who is rumored to be running for President is also in town.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker and Trivette attempt to take down an illegal adoption agency.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker and Trivette stop in a small town while transporting a likable prisoner. The sheriff rules the town with strict laws, harsh enforcement, and promotes racism with his deputies.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble learns a one-armed man has been arrested and risks capture to see if he is the man who killed his wife, in the first of a two part story.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A paper match becomes a stumbling block as Richard Kimble and Karen Christian dream of a life together beyond pursuit.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Richard Kimble accepts employment as a lifeguard at a swank Nevada hotel and soon finds himself squarely in the middle of a feud raging between the hotel owner and his spoiled daughter.

programme.title: Midnight Cowboy
programme.desc: This Academy Award-winning Best Picture stars Dustin Hoffman and Jon Voight in standout, Oscar-nominated performances as a con man and a Texas hustler trying to survive on the tough streets of New York. The legendary John Schlesinger directs.

programme.title: Just A Gigolo
programme.desc: After World War I, a war hero returns to Berlin to find that there's no place for him--he has no skills other than what he learned in the army, and can only find menial, low-paying jobs. He decides to become a gigolo to lonely rich women.

programme.title: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: Cheech and Chong make their film debut in this riotous rock'n'roll comedy, bringing with them the same madness, lifestyles and sketches that sold over 10 million records in the early 1970s.

programme.title: The Gambler (1974)
programme.desc: James Caan portrays a compulsive gambler who can't quit or win. He falls into debt to the mob for $40,000 but seems to relish the thrill of gambling against the long shot.

programme.title: Love And Bullets
programme.desc: The FBI sends a loner (Charles Bronson) to kidnap a mobster's mistress in Switzerland.

programme.title: The Killer Elite
programme.desc: James Caan and Robert Duvall star in Sam Peckinpah's tense, action-packed thriller that explores savagery and betrayal in the murky world of killers-for-hire.

programme.title: Little Big Man
programme.desc: From director Arthur Penn (BONNIE AND CLYDE), Dustin Hoffman, Chief Dan George, Faye Dunaway, Martin Balsam, Jeff Corey and Richard Mulligan star in a genre-defying tale of an alleged 121-year-old white survivor of Custer's Last Stand.

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventure
programme.desc: Our non-heinous heroes Bill (Alex Winter) and Ted (Keanu Reeves) are in danger of flunking history! But when the righteous Rufus (George Carlin) arrives in a time-travelling phone booth, the dense dudes discover their destiny!

programme.title: Desperately Seeking Susan
programme.desc: A bored New Jersey suburban housewife's fascination with a kooky character she's read about in the personal columns leads to her being mistaken for the woman herself.

programme.title: Something Wild
programme.desc: A conservative executive accepts a ride with a wild, eccentric woman, who takes him on an outrageous odyssey that turns both their worlds upside down.

programme.title: Some Kind of Wonderful (1987)
programme.desc: In this story from legendary filmmaker John Hughes, Keith, Watts and Amanda prove that you've got to risk a broken heart in order to find your one true love. This unforgettable romantic comedy has laughs, romance and is truly Some Kind of Wonderful.

programme.title: Ferris Bueller's Day Off

programme.title: Eddie and the Cruisers
programme.desc: A reporter begins tracking down rumors of an unreleased album by a rock band whose charismatic leader disappeared after an accident and was presumed dead years before.

programme.title: Real Genius
programme.desc: When a group of crazy college geniuses puts their heads together, almost anything can happen. Hold on for a freewheeling, uproarious look at just how much mischief a bunch of high-IQers can concoct. Rated: PG-13

programme.title: The Brady Bunch Movie

programme.title: A Very Brady Sequel

programme.title: Harriet the Spy

programme.title: Kingpin
programme.desc: A star bowler whose career was prematurely "cut off" hopes to ride a new prodigy to success and riches.

programme.title: Moon

programme.title: Memento
programme.desc: A man with short-term memory loss attempts to track down his wife's murderer.

programme.title: Vanilla Sky
programme.desc: Young and wealthy, David can have anything his heart desires. But his life seems incomplete. One night, David meets the woman of his dreams and believes he may have found the missing piece.

programme.title: Adaptation
programme.desc: Director Spike Jonze delivers a stunningly original comedy that seamlessly blends fictional characters and situations with the lives of real people. As Charlie struggles to adapt Orlean's best-selling book "The Orchid Thief".Rated: R

programme.title: Moon
programme.desc: Sam Bell (Sam Rockwell) is nearing the completion of his 3-year-long contract with Lunar Industries, mining Earth's primary source of energy on the dark side of the moon.

programme.title: Vanilla Sky
programme.desc: Young and wealthy, David can have anything his heart desires. But his life seems incomplete. One night, David meets the woman of his dreams and believes he may have found the missing piece.

programme.title: Visit To A Small Planet
programme.desc: Curious about humans, Lewis parks his spaceship in the backyard of a skeptic, and both get a glimpse of a world they'll never forget! Based on the play by Gore Vidal.

programme.title: Pork Chop Hill
programme.desc: Gregory Peck heads an all-star cast in this true re-enactment of the terrifying Korean War that brilliantly pulls the viewer inextricably into the crossfire that surrounds American foot soldiers.

programme.title: Island In The Sky
programme.desc: Set after World War II, John Wayne plays Dooley, a former army pilot flying transport missions, who is forced to crash-land his fuel-starved plane on a frozen lake after it strays from its course.

programme.title: The Best Years of Our Lives
programme.desc: Three World War II veterans return home to small-town America to discover that they and their families have been irreparably changed.

programme.title: Strategic Air Command
programme.desc: Aviation and sports come together as a baseball player is recalled to Air Force duty.

programme.title: It's a Mad, Mad, Mad, Mad World
programme.desc: Spencer Tracy leads a hilariously zany cast of Hollywood's greatest comedians (including Milton Berle, Sid Caesar, Ethel Merman and Mickey Rooney) as eight vacation-bound motorists set off on a mad-cap, side-splitting race to find a stolen fortune!

programme.title: Arrival
programme.desc: When mysterious spacecraft touch down across the globe, an elite team - led by expert translator Louise Banks (Academy Award® nominee Amy Adams) – races against time to decipher their intent.

programme.title: Aeon Flux
programme.desc: Academy Award-winner Charlize Theron stars as Aeon Flux, the underground operative fighting totalitarian rule in 25th-century Earth's last living city.

programme.title: Project Almanac
programme.desc: When five teens discover a machine that can send them back in time, the possibilities seem endless. But by changing the past, they have threatened the future of our world. Can they undo the damage they have unleashed before it’s too late?

programme.title: Lemony Snicket's A Series of Unfortunate Events
programme.desc: A thrilling misadventure involving three ingenious orphans and a villainous actor named Count Olaf (Jim Carrey) who wants their enormous fortune.

programme.title: The Island
programme.desc: A man goes on the run after he discovers that he is actually a "harvested being", and is being kept along with others in a utopian facility.

programme.title: Aeon Flux
programme.desc: Academy Award-winner Charlize Theron stars as Aeon Flux, the underground operative fighting totalitarian rule in 25th-century Earth's last living city.

programme.title: The Phantom
programme.desc: The story begins as an expedition lands on the island of Bengalla, seeking the Skulls of Touganda. Believed to harness an energy force of power, they could spell disaster for mankind.

programme.title: Now You See Me
programme.desc: A federal agent (Mark Ruffalo) and an Interpol detective (Mélanie Laurent) play a cat-and-mouse game with cunning illusionists who rob corrupt business leaders during their performances, then funnel the money to members of the audience.

programme.title: Now You See Me 2
programme.desc: A devious tech wizard forces the illusionists known as the Four Horsemen to steal a powerful chip that can control all the world's computers.

programme.title: The Legend of Hercules
programme.desc: Betrayed by his stepfather, the King, and exiled and sold into slavery because of a forbidden love, Hercules must use his formidable powers to fight his way back to his rightful kingdom.

programme.title: I, Frankenstein
programme.desc: Still alive in modern times, Frankenstein's creature (Aaron Eckhart) becomes caught in the middle, as gargoyles and demons wage war for the souls of mankind.

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter
programme.desc: The fate of the human race hangs in the balance when the Witch Queen rises from the dead, seeking revenge against Kaulder, the immortal warrior who slayed her centuries ago.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: Legendary half-demon Hellboy encounters an ancient resurrected sorceress who's out to avenge a past betrayal. Caught in a clash between the supernatural and the human, Hellboy becomes hell-bent on stopping her without triggering the end of the world.

programme.title: Conan the Barbarian
programme.desc: The Cimmerian warrior slashes his way across Hyboria on a mission that begins as a personal vendetta but turns into an epic battle against a supernatural evil.

programme.title: Fire And Ice
programme.desc: Experience a world unlike any ever seen, where savage warriors, horrific monsters and luscious maidens battle for the soul of a civilization in a time of good and evil, pleasure and pain, and FIRE AND ICE.

programme.title: Ghost In The Shell
programme.desc: 2029 – A female government cyber agent and the Internal Bureau of Investigations are hot on the trail of a "The Puppet Master" – a computer virus capable of invading cybernetic brains and altering its victim’s memory.

programme.title: Battle Royale
programme.desc: A group of students from a Japanese high school are forced to compete in a battle, killing one another until only one is left standing.

programme.title: Tokyo!
programme.desc: Three short films set in Tokyo chronicle the metamorphosis of a woman, the trial of a man who emerges from a manhole, and a reclusive man's first experience with human contact during an earthquake.

programme.title: Paris, je t'aime
programme.desc: Set against a romantic Parisian backdrop, this delightful anthology explores the many faces of love. Featuring Natalie Portman, Elijah Wood, Maggie Gyllenhaal, Emily Mortimer.

programme.title: New York I Love You
programme.desc: In the city that never sleeps, love is always on the mind. Those passions come to life in New York, I Love You, a collaboration of storytelling from some of today's most imaginative filmmakers and featuring an all-star cast.

programme.title: Rio I Love You
programme.desc: The series that started 'Paris, je t'aime' and 'New York, I Love You" travels to Rio de Janeiro to tell tales of love from the filmmakers that brought you City of God, Babel, 21 Grams, Youth, The Great Beauty,and more!

programme.title: Kate & Leopold
programme.desc: When a rip in time brings together a charming 19th-century bachelor and a thoroughly 21st-century woman, the potential for an old-fashioned modern romance ignites!

programme.title: I.Q.
programme.desc: All the world knows about Einstein the scientific genius. But what about Einstein the matchmaker? I.Q. puts this notion to the test and comes up with winning results in this “fun, warmhearted romantic comedy” that has critics and audiences cheering.

programme.title: Against the Ropes
programme.desc: Against the Ropes stars Meg Ryan as Kallen, a sassy, brassy boxing manager-in-the-making determined to change "Lethal" Luther Shaw from a mere street punk into a world-class prizefighter.

programme.title: Windtalkers
programme.desc: True story about members of the Navajo tribe who proudly served the U.S. in WW II as code talkers by using their native language as a code to relay information to military leaders.

programme.title: Doubt
programme.desc: A mesmerizing, suspense-filled drama elevated by four riveting Oscar-nominated performances from Meryl Streep, Philip Seymour Hoffman, Amy Adams, and Viola Davis, DOUBT will have you pinned to the edge of your seat.

programme.title: Florence Foster Jenkins
programme.desc: Based on the incredible true story, Meryl Streep delivers a hilarious and touching performance as a New York socialite who dreams of becoming a great opera singer, despite having a hilariously awful singing voice.

programme.title: August: Osage County
programme.desc: Meryl Streep and Julia Roberts lead an all-star cast. A family crisis unites a dispersed group of siblings at the Oklahoma house they grew up in with the dysfunctional woman who raised them.

programme.title: Popeye
programme.desc: The legendary, beloved anvil-armed sailor of the seven seas comes magically to life in this delightful musical, starring Robin Williams as Popeye, who meets all challenges with the unshakable philosophy, "I yam what I yam and that's all that I yam."

programme.title: Cutthroat Island
programme.desc: A female pirate and her companion race against their rivals to find a hidden island that contains a fabulous treasure.

programme.title: Mommie Dearest
programme.desc: The public Crawford was strong-willed, glamorous and admirable, but Mommie Dearest reveals the private Crawford, the woman desperate to be a mother, adopting her children when she was single and trying to survive in the devastating movie industry.

programme.title: Popeye
programme.desc: The legendary, beloved anvil-armed sailor of the seven seas comes magically to life in this delightful musical, starring Robin Williams as Popeye, who meets all challenges with the unshakable philosophy, "I yam what I yam and that's all that I yam."

programme.title: Cherry 2000
programme.desc: What used to be the American Southwest. In this post-MAD MAX Adventureture, a woman mercenary is hired to bust into a 21st-century robot Warehouse which is operated by psychos.

programme.title: Yellowbeard
programme.desc: A 17th-century pirate in search of treasure. He's accompanied by his son, who has the location of the treasure tattooed on his head. It is a parody on the pirate movies of earlier days.

programme.title: Elvira: Mistress of the Dark
programme.desc: When wise-cracking vamp Elvira learns that her wealthy Aunt Morgana has just died, she rushes off for the reading of the will. She can't help but stir things up when she makes her appearance in the old-fashioned, conservative town.

programme.title: A Night at the Roxbury
programme.desc: It seems like Steve and Doug will never be cool enough to make the Roxbury club’s guest list. Until they have a fender bender with their role model, club regular Richard Grieco. Eager to avoid litigation, Grieco befriends the starstruck pair.

programme.title: Superstar
programme.desc: All Mary Katherine Gallagher wants in life is a kiss. Not just any kiss, mind you – a Hollywood-style kiss. But no matter how hard she tries, no one will kiss her. She decides that to get her kiss, she must become just like the people in the movies.

programme.title: School of Rock
programme.desc: Jack Black stars as a guitarist with delusions of grandeur. Kicked out of his band and looking for work, he becomes a substitute teacher and turns his class into rock and rollers.

programme.title: Heartbreakers
programme.desc: Max and Page are a mother/daughter con team. Max targets wealthy men and marries them. Page then seduces them while Max "catches" her wayward husbands in the act. Then on to the next mark, posing in a variety of guises to keep one step ahead of the law.

programme.title: Heartburn
programme.desc: She's a magazine writer who gives up her career for love and family. He's a playboy newspaper columnist who can't quite give up his old tricks. And if that combination doesn't give a relationship Heartburn, nothing will!

programme.title: Grumpier Old Men
programme.desc: In this sequel to Grumpy Old Men, a vivacious Italian beauty attempts to convert Wabasha, Minnesota's cherished bait store into a romantic Italian restaurant.

programme.title: Grumpy Old Men
programme.desc: Jack Lemmon and Walter Matthau portray lifelong feuding neighbors making each day a hilarious game of revenge. But then voluptuous Ariel moves in nearby and their dormant hormones reignite in an all-out competition to win her favor.

programme.title: Eddie and the Cruisers
programme.desc: A reporter begins tracking down rumors of an unreleased album by a rock band whose charismatic leader disappeared after an accident and was presumed dead years before.

programme.title: Pieces of April
programme.desc: A head strong young woman, who has alienated her parents is forced to confront their troubled relationship when she learns that her mother, is dying of cancer.

programme.title: Braveheart
programme.desc: William Wallace, a commoner, unites the 13th Century Scots in their battle to overthrow English rule.

programme.title: Forrest Gump
programme.desc: Tom Hanks gives an astonishing performance as Forrest, an everyman whose simple innocence comes to embody a generation.

programme.title: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: Tom Cruise stars as a brash Navy lawyer who's teamed with a gung-ho litigator (Demi Moore) in a politically explosive murder case, defending two Marines accused of killing a fellow soldier

programme.title: The Godfather Part II
programme.desc: The continuing saga of a young Vito Corleone growing up in Sicily and in New York during the 1910s and then following Michael Corleone in the 1950s as he tries to expand the family business.

programme.title: Mario Puzo's The Godfather Coda: The Death of Michael Corleone
programme.desc: Director/screenwriter Francis Ford Coppola's definitive new edit and restoration of THE GODFATHER: PART III, with remastered picture and sound. Michael Corleone (Pacino) seeks to free his family from crime and find a suitable successor to his empire.

programme.title: State of Grace
programme.desc: In this neo-noir crime film, an undercover cop (Sean Penn) comes back to his old neighborhood in New York City's Hell's Kitchen to bring down the Irish Mafia, which is now led by two of his childhood friends (Gary Oldman and Ed Harris).

programme.title: Revolver
programme.desc: REVOLVER is populated with Guy Ritchie's (Snatch; Lock, Stock & Two Smoking Barrels) classic breed of fast-talking, sharp-suited gangsters but with a psychological twist that your mind may not be able to handle.

programme.title: Money Train
programme.desc: John (Wesley Snipes) and Charlie (Woody Harrelson) are partners, best friends, and foster brothers. Both are transit cops who work undercover on the New York subway.

programme.title: Collateral
programme.desc: Vincent is a cool, calculating contract killer at the top of his game. Max is a cabbie with big dreams and no results. On this fateful night, Max has to transport Vincent on his next job - one night, five stops, five hits and a getaway.

programme.title: Borderline (2023)
programme.desc: Mads, a successful marketing executive, has a chance encounter with Joan. He returns to his life back home, but for Joan, it doesn't end there.

programme.title: A Most Wanted Man
programme.desc: Phillip Seymour Hoffman stars in this action-thriller from spymaster John Le Carre. German and U.S. intelligence agencies race to uncover the identity of a mysterious man.

programme.title: Collateral
programme.desc: Vincent is a cool, calculating contract killer at the top of his game. Max is a cabbie with big dreams and no results. On this fateful night, Max has to transport Vincent on his next job - one night, five stops, five hits and a getaway.

programme.title: Borderline (2023)
programme.desc: Mads, a successful marketing executive, has a chance encounter with Joan. He returns to his life back home, but for Joan, it doesn't end there.

programme.title: Out of Time
programme.desc: Denzel Washington stars in this spell-binding thriller as the Chief of Police of a small town who finds himself caught in the eye of a storm as he investigates the murder of a woman he was secretly seeing….because all the evidence points to him!

programme.title: Disturbia
programme.desc: Living under three months' house arrest, Kale Brecht (Shia LaBeouf, Transformers) passes his days spying on the neighbors. It's all fun and games until things take a horrifying turn for the worse.

programme.title: Carrie (2002)
programme.desc: Angela Bettis stars in this adaptation of Stephen King's classic tale of horror. Carrie White has been cursed with the power of telekinesis and when her tormenters commit an act of unforgivable humiliation, they'll soon learn a deadly lesson.

programme.title: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: The wife of a professor investigates the murder of a beautiful college student who has been appearing to her.

programme.title: Bug
programme.desc: A paranoid, unhinged war veteran who sees insects everywhere holes up with a lonely woman in a spooky Oklahoma motel room.

programme.title: Overlord
programme.desc: Nothing can prepare you for the mind-blowing mayhem that is Overlord. Mega producer J.J. Abrams creates an insanely twisted thrill ride about a team of American troops who come face-to-face with Nazi super-soldiers unlike the world has ever seen.

programme.title: World War Z
programme.desc: World War Z is the fast-paced, pulse-pounding epic of the potential last days of the human race. Former United Nations employee Gerry Lane (Brad Pitt) is called in to help stop the pandemic that has spread around the world.

programme.title: George A. Romero's Survival of the Dead
programme.desc: The final film from George A. Romero (legendary creator of the Night of the Living Dead franchise) picks up where Diary of the Dead leaves off - in a nightmarish world where humans are the minority and the zombies rule.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom brings you thrills and excitement. Indy, his sidekick Short Round and nightclub singer Willie Scott go from high-flying action above the Himalayas to a spine-tingling escape from a fortress-like mine in India.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: There's nothing more exciting than trying to keep up with the Joneses in Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade. Indy's Nazi enemies are back and have kidnapped his father, in their effort to locate the sacred Holy Grail.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: STEVEN SPIELBERG and GEORGE LUCAS bring you the greatest adventurer of all time! Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull finds Indy trying to outrace a brilliant and beautiful agent for the mystical, all-powerful crystal skull of Akator.

programme.title: Alex Rider: Operation Stormbreaker
programme.desc: After his uncle dies, a young boy learns of his relative's true occupation as an undercover spy and is later recruited to be undercover himself. Based on the novel by Anthony Horowitz.

programme.title: The Dark Crystal
programme.desc: On another planet in the distant past, a Gelfling embarks on a quest to find the missing shard of a magical crystal, and to restore order to his world.

programme.desc: First Asia hurtled into Europe. Then, India crashed violently into the Asian continent. That shock gave birth to the highest mountain range in the world, the Himalayas. But it also released dangerous gases believed to have caused dinosaur extinction...

programme.title: Voyage of the Continents: Asia: Rising Mountains and Sinking Countries

programme.title: Voyage of the Continents: Europe: Tropical Beginnings
